marketing.ownersSubtitle: Automate the grind, keep the judgement. Rent reminders, reconciliation, owner-grade reports.
marketing.tenantsSubtitle: Your rent receipts, maintenance tickets, and notices in one place. In English or Swahili.
marketing.managersSubtitle: Run 200 units single-handed. Owner reports, vendor dispatch, and a copilot who drafts before you ask.
marketing.stationMastersSubtitle: Voice-first incident logging in Swahili. Offline when connectivity dies.

marketing.pricingSubtitle: Four tiers. Talk to Mr. Mwikila for a custom quote.
marketing.howItWorksSubtitle: One brain across every role. Talk anywhere, and he learns as he goes.

marketing.handoffCardTitle: Karibu. Let me hand you to signup.
marketing.handoffCardBody: I have saved everything we discussed — role, portfolio, country, and your main pain point. Signup takes 90 seconds.

emergenciesPage.title: Emergency Contacts
emergenciesPage.lifeThreateningBody: Call 999 immediately for police, fire, or ambulance.
emergenciesPage.reportExamples: Water leak, power outage, security issue

supportPage.title: Help & Support
supportPage.faq1Q: How do I pay my rent?
supportPage.faq1A: You can pay rent through M-Pesa or bank transfer. Go to Payments > Pay and follow the instructions. Payment confirmation is sent within 24 hours.
supportPage.faq2Q: How do I submit a maintenance request?
supportPage.faq2A: Go to Requests > New Request, select the issue category, describe the problem, and add photos if needed. We typically respond within 24–48 hours.
supportPage.faq3A: Rent is due on the 1st of each month. You can view your exact due date and amount in the Lease section. We send reminders 5 days before the due date.
supportPage.faq4Q: How do I download my lease document?
supportPage.faq4A: Go to Lease > Documents and tap the download icon next to your lease agreement. You can also access it from the lease details page.
supportPage.faq5Q: Who do I contact for emergencies?
supportPage.faq5A: For urgent maintenance (water leaks, power outages, security issues), call the emergency contact numbers listed below. For life-threatening emergencies, dial 999.
supportPage.feedbackDesc: Or use our full feedback form for more options and history.
supportPage.feedbackThanks: Thank you! Your feedback has been submitted.
supportPage.feedbackPlaceholder: Share your suggestions or report an issue...

requestsPage.title: Maintenance Requests
requestsPage.unavailableBody: This screen previously rendered static request records. It now requires a live maintenance feed from the backend.

onboarding.stepWelcomeDesc: Get started with your new home
onboarding.welcomeBody: Complete these quick steps to finalize your move-in process and get your keys.
onboarding.verifyIdentityBody: Upload clear photos of your ID document and a selfie for verification.
onboarding.securityNote: Your documents are encrypted and stored securely. We use them only for identity verification.
onboarding.inspectionBody: Document the current condition of your unit before moving in.
onboarding.inspectionWalkthrough: Walk through each room and document any existing damage or issues. This protects your security deposit.
onboarding.takePhotosDesc: Document any scratches, stains, or damage
onboarding.addNotesDesc: Describe condition of walls, floors, appliances
onboarding.rateConditionDesc: Mark items as good, fair, or poor condition
onboarding.signLeaseBody: Review and sign your lease agreement to complete the onboarding.
onboarding.signHint: Sign above using your finger or mouse
onboarding.termsAgreement: I have read and agree to the Lease Agreement, House Rules, and Privacy Policy. I understand this electronic signature is legally binding.
